description_long: This object consists of three brown, polygonal candles of varying heights and diameters, grouped closely together in a cluster. Each candle has a flat, faceted surface with a distinct octagonal cross-section, giving them a geometric, modern appearance. The tops of the candles are flat, with a short, white wick protruding from the center of each. The candles are solid in color, with no visible wax drips, decorative patterns, or holders at their bases. The overall look is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban decorative settings such as outdoor patios, sidewalk cafes, or public plazas. The candles appear to be made entirely of wax with visible wicks, and are designed to rest directly on flat surfaces.
description: A cluster of three brown, faceted candles of different heights with white wicks, featuring a modern, geometric design. The candles are solid and unadorned, suitable for urban decorative use.
description_view_0: Three brown, polygonal candles of varying heights are visible, with all three wicks clearly seen and the tallest candle positioned at the left.
description_view_1: The candles are viewed from the opposite side, showing the shortest candle in the foreground and the wicks of all three candles visible from a different angle.
description_view_2: This view highlights the two taller candles, with the shortest candle partially obscured behind them and only its wick visible.
description_view_3: The tallest candle dominates the view, with the other two candles partially hidden behind it, and only their tops and wicks slightly visible.
